creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to yu shan wei from comment #1)

> … 13.0-RELEASE-p3 …

Did you remember to restart the operating system as an essential part of a freebsd-update routine?

If there's difficulty, you may ask questions in FreeBSD Forums, or on the mailing list: 

<https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-questions>
